title: Korbond 110358 Craft 7 Inch – Soft Grip Professional, Household, Fabric, Paper Scissors. Ambidextrous – for Right & Left Handed , Silver
features: With over 60 years of trading, Korbond is the UK’s no. 1 trusted brand of sewing, crafting and clothes care accessories and tools
Korbond craft scissors feature precision ground blades to ensure accurate pattern and fabric cutting every time. Guaranteed to cut right to the tip of the blade

The soft grip handle and overall lightweight makes these shears comfortable to use for extended periods of time, and the specially designed curves make them suitable for both left and right-handed users
Ideal for sewing, crafting, knitting, crochet, paper crafts, scrapbooking, household and kitchen use
To view our full range Click on ''by Korbond'' Above to visit our Amazon store
description: Product Description Craft room basics from decoupage to knitting and crochet uses, Korbond scissors use precision ground blades making sure the smoothest and most accurate cut is achieved every time. The stainless-steel blades ensure Korbond dressmaking scissors stay sharper for longer and remain resistant to rust, making them the experienced crafter’s new favourite tool. Left & right handed Korbond 7 Inch craft scissors are ambidextrous, meaning Whichever hand is your dominant, you can always be sure of a comfortable grip. Safety Warning Take care when using. Not suitable for unsupervised children. Box Contains 1 x Craft Scissors 7" Manufacturer Contact Information Authorised Representative Service, 77 Camden Street Lower, Dublin, D02 XE80, Ireland.
